task.title: Slack Integration Service
task.description: Implement Slack delivery service with Effect retry logic and error handling

implementation.details:
1. Create SlackService using Effect.Service pattern
2. Implement webhook and Bot API delivery methods
3. Add Effect.retry with exponential backoff
4. Handle Slack-specific errors as tagged unions
5. Add rate limiting with Effect.Semaphore

task.acceptance_criteria: Can deliver notifications to Slack webhooks, retries work on failures, rate limiting prevents API abuse
